patches.hypothesis: The refined fix addresses the hardcoded values and adds a more robust algorithm to handle general cases, while maintaining test-passing behavior and including proper edge case handling. The root cause of overfitting is fixed by refactoring the code to remove hardcoded values, while improving the overall quality of the code.
The iterator returned by the `chromosomes` list was not being wrapped in an unmodifiable iterator, which was causing the `UnsupportedOperationException` when calling `iter.remove()`.
